Why Two Products, Not One

You don't need another Microsoft consultancy.

Microsoft, SAP, Oracle, Salesforce — whatever you already run — is infrastructure. It's the operating system underneath your business. HALU™ and Zonar OS™ are the intelligence layer Neural Horizons builds on top of it.

TWO PRODUCTS. ONE STACK.

Choose your entry point.

Most clients start with HALU™ and upgrade to Zonar OS™ once they see results. Both products are built and supported by Neural Horizons AI.

⚡ Start here · Deploy in 2–4 weeks
HALU™
The autonomous agent that monitors every department, finds revenue leaks, generates action items and delivers results — continuously, without human intervention.
  • Monitors all departments simultaneously
  • Revenue leak detection in real time
  • Autonomous action item generation
  • Intelligent escalation to leadership
  • Zonar™ Metrics reporting
  • Runs on top of your existing tools

Zonar OS™
The AI operating platform that powers HALU™ — and every AI workflow in your business. Built for enterprises that need deep integrations, custom AI models and enterprise-grade infrastructure.
  • Full AI operating system for your business
  • Deep CRM, ERP & analytics integrations
  • Custom AI model training & tuning
  • Multi-department workflow orchestration
  • White-label licensing available
  • SLA guarantee & dedicated team

How clients grow with the platform.

FAQ

Common questions.

Everything you need to know about HALU™, Zonar OS™ and how they work together.

What is the difference between HALU™ and Zonar OS™? +
Zonar OS™ is the AI operating platform — the infrastructure layer that connects your business data, integrations and workflows. HALU™ is the autonomous agent that runs on Zonar OS™. It monitors departments, detects revenue leaks, generates action items and delivers results. Think of it this way: HALU™ is the door. Zonar OS™ is the house.
Which should I start with — HALU™ or Zonar OS™? +
Start with HALU™. It deploys in 2–4 weeks on top of your existing tools, with no rip-and-replace required. Within 30 days most clients identify AED 200K–500K in revenue leaks. Once HALU™ has proven its value, Zonar OS™ becomes the natural enterprise upgrade.
Can HALU™ run without Zonar OS™? +
Yes. HALU™ is a standalone agent that connects to your existing CRM, analytics and communication tools. You don't need Zonar OS™ to get started. Zonar OS™ is the enterprise upgrade that gives HALU™ deeper integrations and enhanced capabilities across larger organisations.
Is HALU™ or Zonar OS™ available as a white-label product? +
Yes. Both HALU™ and Zonar OS™ are available as white-label products under enterprise licensing. You can deploy and sell them under your own brand. Contact us at support@neuralhorizonsai.com for white-label pricing.
How quickly can they be deployed? +
HALU™ deploys in 2–4 weeks with no rip-and-replace. Zonar OS™ enterprise deployment typically takes 4–8 weeks depending on integration complexity. We handle all setup, training and onboarding — you just need to start with the free AI audit.
Do you work with businesses outside the UAE? +
Yes. Neural Horizons AI serves clients globally. HALU™ and Zonar OS™ are cloud-based and deploy into any business regardless of location. We have clients across the Middle East, Europe and beyond.
⚡

Start with the free audit.
We'll show you where to begin.

In 24 hours we'll map your revenue leaks, identify your fastest AI wins and recommend whether HALU™, Zonar OS™ or both is the right starting point for your business.
